description: Places that do not follow the rules of the natural world, where reality bends and the familiar becomes strange.
biomes: Colors too vivid to be real. Flowers that whisper. Time moves at its own pace here, and those who enter rarely leave on the day they planned.
Everything exists in muted grey. The light has no source, the ground has no warmth, and your own shadow does not behave.
Chunks of earth and stone drift through open sky, connected by nothing but wind and old bridges that sway in the void.
Heat that sears the lungs and a red glow on the horizon that never fades. The ground cracks and bleeds fire.
A pale mist where solid things turn transparent and distance loses meaning. Voices carry from nowhere and everywhere.
An endless expanse of star-flecked darkness where thought moves you forward and gravity is only a memory.
Broken pieces of reality floating in nothing. The edges crumble into darkness and the silence is so deep it hums.
Landscapes that shift with your thoughts. Familiar places bleed into impossible ones, and waking up is never guaranteed.
